workflows.name: AI Product Manager — Survey Ingestion Pipeline
workflows.description: Watches for new survey responses (Google Forms/Sheets), processes them through the scoring engine, and triggers report generation.

nodes.name: Google Sheets Trigger
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual Google Sheets ID containing survey responses

nodes.name: Run Scoring Engine
nodes.notes: If running locally, use the CLI. For cloud: set up a webhook endpoint that triggers the Python scoring engine.

nodes.name: Send Notification

config.message: 🔄 New survey response processed. {{$json.total}} capabilities rescored. {{$json.changes.length}} significant score changes detected.

nodes.notes: Replace with your Slack channel or use email node instead

workflows.name: AI Product Manager — Weekly Report Generation
workflows.description: Runs weekly to regenerate prioritization reports and stakeholder decks, then distributes them.

nodes.name: Run Full Pipeline
nodes.notes: Adjust path to your AI Product Manager installation

config.subject: Weekly Capability Prioritization Update — {{$now.format('MMM D, YYYY')}}
config.body:
Hi team,

The weekly capability prioritization report has been generated and is available in the shared Drive folder.

Key highlights:
- {{$json.high_priority}} capabilities rated HIGH priority
- Top capability: {{$json.top_capability}}
- {{$json.new_responses}} new survey responses processed

Best,
AI Product Manager

workflows.name: AI Product Manager — Score Change Alerting
workflows.description: Monitors for significant scoring changes and alerts the product team in real-time.

workflows.name: AI Product Manager — Interview Scheduler
workflows.description: Identifies willing survey participants and sends interview scheduling invites.

config.description: Thank you for participating in our survey. We'd love to hear more about your needs in a 1-hour roadmap and design interview.

prerequisites: Google Cloud Console project with these APIs enabled: Sheets, Drive, Calendar, Gmail
Google OAuth2 credentials configured in n8n
google_cloud_setup: 3. Enable APIs: Google Sheets API, Google Drive API, Google Calendar API, Gmail API
5. Add n8n callback URL to authorized redirect URIs
6. In n8n: Settings → Credentials → Add Google OAuth2 credential
7. Paste Client ID and Client Secret, then authorize

placeholder_values.YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID: The ID from your Google Sheets URL (between /d/ and /edit)
placeholder_values.YOUR_MASTER_SHEET_ID: ID of the master sheet that accumulates all responses
placeholder_values.YOUR_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID: Google Drive folder ID for report storage
placeholder_values.YOUR_SCORING_API_URL: URL where the scoring API is hosted (or use CLI for local execution)
placeholder_values.STAKEHOLDER_EMAIL_LIST: Comma-separated email list for report distribution
